I'm Kareem Basem, a Management Information Systems student at Sadat Academy. I have some practical experience and I'm always working on projects that help me learn and improve. I have good problem-solving skills and a solid understanding of software and operating systems, and I'm passionate about technology.

Currently building a focused path in AI & Cybersecurity — completing the Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate and expanding into Networking as a natural extension of that path.

🏅 National Scout Excellence Champion — 1st Place (2020)
